name: Barbell
description: A long metal bar used with weight plates for compound lifts such as squats, deadlifts, and bench press.

name: Dumbbells
description: Short hand-held weights available in fixed or adjustable increments, suitable for unilateral and bilateral exercises.

name: Resistance Bands
description: Elastic bands that add progressive resistance through a range of motion; ideal for warm-ups, mobility work, and assistance exercises.
typicalWeight: 5 kg – 45 kg resistance (varies by band thickness)

name: Pull-Up Bar
description: A horizontal bar mounted in a doorframe or on a rack used for pull-ups, chin-ups, and hanging core exercises.

name: Kettlebell
description: A cast-iron ball with a handle used for dynamic, ballistic movements that combine strength and cardio.

name: Squat Rack
description: A steel frame with adjustable safety bars used to safely hold a loaded barbell for squats and overhead pressing.
